canonicalBoundary.eventCanonicalTarget: Reviewed event clusters may project to read-only external event preflight or events/{eventId} only after import policy approval.
canonicalBoundary.generatedCandidates: Source artifacts, extracted mentions, resolution candidates, and clusters are private intake artifacts.
canonicalBoundary.organizerCanonicalTarget: Reviewed organizer clusters may project to clubs/{clubId} only through publication review and createClub-compatible contracts.
canonicalBoundary.platformVerifiedMeaning: Platform verified means claimed/owner-controlled on Catch; human-reviewed accuracy is tracked separately as reviewVerified.

hardKeyPolicy.note: Provider event IDs are hard keys only for platforms whose source event IDs are stable outside one crawl batch. Editorial/import batch row IDs are not hard provider keys.

costControls: Never call from the React admin app.
Hash normalized prompt inputs and reuse cached JSON outputs.
Send short reviewed excerpts or compact cluster records, not whole pages.
Only send ambiguous clusters under maxClusterSizeForLlm.
Validate JSON output before it can enter generated intake artifacts.

summary: Resolve crawler/editorial organizer and event mentions before canonical Firestore projection.
